title: trichomanes makinoi var. tosae
intro: Trichomanes makinoi var. tosae, also known as the Japanese maidenhair fern, is a rare and endangered species of fern native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of soothing and calming the body. In herbal preparations, Trichomanes makinoi var. tosae is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
